subcodes.first_line: O people of the Bayán, and whosoever hath believed in God and His verses in this perspicuous Dispensation, hearken unto that which enricheth you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اهل البیان و من دان بالله و آیاته فی حی التبیان اسمعوا ما یغن علیکم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
